tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  x2


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
   Staring at a maple leaf[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
  Leaning on the mother tree, I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
   Said to myself[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
"We all lost touch"[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Your favorite fruit is chocolate covered cherries[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
  And seedless watermelon[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, nothing from the ground is good enough[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
   Body rise[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
   It looks over me[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, chariot[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Your golden waves[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Are walking down  upon this place[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B7[/ch]
Oh, chariot[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] 
I'm singing out loud[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
To guide me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Give me your..[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
            Strength[/tab]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
   Remember seeing moon's rebirth[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
  Rings made mirrors of the Earth[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   The sun was just yellow energy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
   There is a living promise land[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
  Even over fields of sand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
   Seasons fill my burden[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Cover me[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
   Bring it back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
   More than a memory[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, chariot[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Your golden waves[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Are walking down  upon this place[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B7[/ch]
Oh, chariot[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I'm singing out loud[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]
To guide me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Give me your strength[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
You'll be my vacation away from this place[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
You know what I want[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Holding that cup[/tab]

That's pouring over
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
The side[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
   Makes me wanna spread my arms and fly[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, chariot[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Your golden waves[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
